name: CARE Cash Management
description: Cash management plugin for CARE. Provides cash drawer session management, transaction tracking, and financial reconciliation for healthcare facility billing operations.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_cash_management_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.

rawSetup.title: Raw setup
rawSetup.description: Start with a minimal plug_config and edit it directly.
